arcs.title: The Goblin Election
arcs.summary: A new arc opens: Head Goblin Ragnok has announced he will stand for re-election as Chief Account-Keeper of Gringotts, his first contested election in thirty years. A rival candidate, Sub-Comptroller Griphook the Younger, has filed candidacy papers and requested an independent character reference. Ragnok has, against all precedent and goblin custom, submitted Christine's name as his. She has not yet been informed.
